classification.task_goal: Convert a numpy integer array to an image using a tile map and display it in a Jupyter notebook.
primary_constraints: The integer values in the array must correspond to valid indices in the tile map.
The resulting image must be displayed correctly without being all white.
classification.reasoning: The assistant initially provided code that led to an all-white image due to incorrect handling of the integer array and tile mapping. The user identified the issue and modified the code to fix the mapping. However, there were still issues with the rotation of the image, indicating ongoing adjustments to meet the task goal.
